DESCRIPTION: After login() the client should report is_logged_in() == True.
NAME: test_login_sets_authenticated_state

DESCRIPTION: A pet should be readable and updatable after creation, then gone after deletion.
NAME: test_create_read_update_delete_pet

DESCRIPTION: Updating a pet's name should persist the change.
NAME: test_update_pet_name

DESCRIPTION: Every pet returned for 'available' should have status == 'available'.
NAME: test_all_returned_pets_match_requested_status

DESCRIPTION: findByStatus should return a non-empty list for every valid status.
NAME: test_find_by_status_returns_list[sold]

DESCRIPTION: Fetching an id that does not exist should result in a 404 response.
NAME: test_get_nonexistent_pet_raises

DESCRIPTION: After login and logout the user should be back on the login page.
NAME: test_login_then_logout_returns_to_login_page

DESCRIPTION: A logged-in user should be able to create and retrieve pets.
NAME: test_authenticated_user_can_add_and_retrieve_pet

DESCRIPTION: Adding a pet should return the created pet with an id.
NAME: test_add_pet_returns_created_pet

DESCRIPTION: The login page title should be 'The Internet'.
NAME: test_page_title_is_correct

DESCRIPTION: A newly registered user should be able to log in and then log out.
NAME: test_register_login_logout_journey

DESCRIPTION: Simulate a user finding an available pet and purchasing it (→ sold).
NAME: test_available_pet_can_be_marked_as_sold

DESCRIPTION: The login response JSON should contain a session token.
NAME: test_login_returns_session_token

DESCRIPTION: Calling logout() after login() should clear the session state.
NAME: test_login_then_logout_clears_session

DESCRIPTION: A valid login request should return HTTP 200 with a session token.
NAME: test_login_with_valid_credentials_returns_200

DESCRIPTION: Fetching a known pet by id should return the correct record.
NAME: test_get_existing_pet

DESCRIPTION: A pet should no longer be found after deletion.
NAME: test_delete_pet_removes_it

DESCRIPTION: Fetching a pet with an ID outside the integer range should fail.
NAME: test_get_pet_with_out_of_range_id

DESCRIPTION: findByStatus should return a non-empty list for every valid status.
NAME: test_find_by_status_returns_list[pending]

DESCRIPTION:
Logging in with valid credentials should show the secure area message.

        This mirrors tests/api/test_login.py::TestLogin::test_login_sets_authenticated_state
        using the identical assertion style.
NAME: test_successful_login_shows_secure_area

DESCRIPTION: Logging in with invalid credentials should show an error message.
NAME: test_failed_login_shows_error_message

DESCRIPTION: findByStatus should return a non-empty list for every valid status.
NAME: test_find_by_status_returns_list[available]

DESCRIPTION: Pets created with the same status should all appear in findByStatus.
NAME: test_multiple_pets_findable_by_status

DESCRIPTION: The login response should have the expected JSON structure.
NAME: test_login_response_structure

DESCRIPTION: The login page should present username and password inputs.
NAME: test_login_form_has_username_and_password_fields
